gracePeriod.title: [Payment failed]
gracePeriod.body: Subscription renewal failed due to a problem with your default payment card.
gracePeriod.deadline: Update your card in your profile before {{date}} to keep your PRO benefits.

offline: You're offline. On-device AI posture detection keeps running, and queued sync logs are sent to the cloud automatically once you're back online.

authLoading.title: Authenticating and syncing your profile...
authLoading.sub: Restoring your cloud settings and profile. Please wait a moment.

taglineSub: A healthier posture habit, every day.
